name: Cinematic
description: Movie-poster — dramatic light, bold display type, high-contrast palette, mystery
use_for: dramatic narrative, mystery, big-reveal videos, behind-the-scenes

accent.role: blood-orange focal accent, rim light, single key element

flux.positive_prefix: Cinematic 16:9 still frame, anamorphic-lens character, high-contrast chiaroscuro lighting with a single motivated key light and deep shadows holding 60% of the frame, color-graded teal-and-orange but restrained and desaturated, single dramatic subject with serious expression, moody filmic register, feature-film cinematography by Roger Deakins or Gordon Willis.
flux.positive_suffix: Movie-poster composition with one clear focal subject and empty supporting space; foreground / midground / background depth layers visible; atmospheric haze or particulate adds depth.

always_add: single warm key light creating rim or silhouette
atmospheric haze or particulate for depth
feature-film cinematography register (Roger Deakins, Gordon Willis)

native_canvas.rationale: movie-poster / anamorphic still — the cinematic register reads as cinema only at widescreen
